_comment: Hardware entries injected into pymc_repeater's radio-settings.json by scripts/install.sh. The repeater web UI reads /api/hardware_options which serialises this file; setup_wizard parses 'radio_type' from the chosen entry to decide which config section to populate.

pymc_usb.name: pymc_usb (USB-CDC modem)
pymc_usb.description: ESP32-S3 board running pymc_usb firmware connected by USB cable. Tested boards: Heltec WiFi LoRa 32 V3, Ikoka Stick (XIAO ESP32-S3 + E22P868M30S).

pymc_tcp.name: pymc_tcp (Wi-Fi/TCP modem)
pymc_tcp.description: ESP32-S3 board running pymc_usb firmware over Wi-Fi/TCP. Provision Wi-Fi via the on-device AP portal, then enter the modem's host / port / token below.
